config.description_long: Configure the bot, `/help config` for all subcommands.

rank.description_long: A rank system to reward members who invited other members, when a member get the required number of invites, they will get the role and if they loses the required number, they will lose the role.

info.description_long:
Get the number of invited currently in the server, invited who leaved and bonus gived by admins for the member.
This command is also avaliable by right clicking a member.

bot_support.description_long: Get an invite to the bot support server to ask a question, post suggestions or open a ticket ask a developer about security concerns or to request data deletion.

help.description_long: 🗺️📌 You are here. Get informations about commands. The only category is 'config'.

bonus.description_long: Add or remove bonus invites of a member. Bonus invites are considered for ranks.

goal_set.description_long: Set the goal list (number of members to reach). The goal list should be separated by spaces, every character other than numbers are removed. This variable is used in the goal channel.

goal_list.description_long: List all current goals, goals are set with `/config goal set (goal list)`.

goal_rename.description_long: Rename the goal channel. The name have a maximum of 100 characters. `{goal}` is replaced by the goal after your member number in the goal list.

goal_create.description_long: Create the goal channel. You can change the name with `/config goal rename (name)`. The bot need the permissions `Manage channels`, `Manage roles` and `Connect` globally to create a voice channel where nobody can connect.

goal_delete.description_long: Delete the goal channel. The bot need the permission `Manage channels` to delete it.

member_counter_create.description_long: Create the member counter channel. You can change the name with `/config member_counter rename (name)`. The bot need the permissions `Manage channels`, `Manage roles` and `Connect` globally to create a voice channel where nobody can connect.

member_counter_delete.description_long: Delete the member counter channel. The bot need the permission `Manage channels` to delete it.

member_counter_rename.description_long: Rename the member counter channel. The name have a maximum of 100 characters. `{memnumber}` is replaced by the number of member.

bot_counter_create.description_long: Create the bot counter channel. You can change the name with `/config bot_counter rename (name)`. The bot need the permissions `Manage channels`, `Manage roles` and `Connect` globally to create a voice channel where nobody can connect.

bot_counter_delete.description_long: Delete the bot counter channel. The bot need the permission `Manage channels` to delete it.

bot_counter_rename.description_long: Rename the bot counter channel. The name have a maximum of 100 characters. `{botnumber}` is replaced by the number of bots.

welcome_channel.description_long: Choose the channel where the bot will send welcome messages. The bot need permission `View Channel` and `Send messages` in the channel to send welcome messages.

welcome_message.description_long: Change the welcome message. The message have a maximum of 1024 characters. Variables are: `{server}`,`{member}`,`{membermention}`, `{inviter}`, `{invitermention}`, `{membernum}`, `{goal}`, `{togoal}`, `{invitercount}`.

welcome_embed.description_long: Choose if the welcome message will be in an embed.

welcome_toggle.description_long: Choose if the bot should send welcome messages.

goodbye_channel.description_long: Choose the channel where the bot will send goodbye messages. The bot need permission `View Channel` and `Send messages` in the channel to send welcome messages.

goodbye_message.description_long: Change the goodbye message. The message have a maximum of 1024 characters. Variables are: `{server}`,`{member}`,`{membermention}`, `{inviter}`, `{invitermention}`, `{membernum}`, `{goal}`, `{togoal}`, `{invitercount}`.

goodbye_embed.description_long: Choose if the goodbye message will be in an embed.

goodbye_toggle.description_long: Choose if the bot should send goodbye messages.

language.description_long: Choose the language of the bot. If the bot is not avaliable in your language and you want to translate it, contact a developer by ticket in the support (`/bot_support`).

auto_role.description_long: Choose a role to add to all new members.

admin_role.description_long: Choose a role who can use admin commands. Everyone with the permission `Administrator` or this role can modify the bot configuration.

errors.title: ⚠️ __Error__
errors.member_not_admin: You do not have Administrator role nor `Administrators` permission on this server.
errors.bot_permission_manage_role: This bot does not have the permission to `Manage roles`.
errors.bot_permission_connect: This bot does not have the permission to `Connect`, The bot need this permission for creating a channel where members can't join.
errors.bot_permission_manage_channels: This bot does not have the permission to `Manage channels`.
errors.bot_permission_view_channel: This bot does not have the permission to `View Channels`.
errors.bot_permission_send_messages: This bot does not have the permission to `Send messages` in channel {channel}.
errors.role_managed: Role {role} is managed by another application.
errors.role_above_bot: Role {role} is above the highest role the bot can manage.
errors.no_goal_list: The goal list does not contain any number.
errors.not_rank: The role {role} is not a rank.
errors.channel_name_too_long: The channel name is too long, the max is 100 characters.
errors.welcome_message_too_long: The welcome message is too long, the max is 1024 characters.
errors.goodbye_message_too_long: The goodbye message is too long, the max is 1024 characters.
errors.unknown: A non managed error occured, some diagnostic information have been sent in order to fix the problem.

output.config_goal_rename_field_name: Goal channel name is now set to:
output.config_member_counter_rename_field_name: Members counter channel is now called:
output.config_member_counter_delete_description: Members counter channel has been deteled.
output.config_bot_counter_rename_field_name: Bots counter channel is now called:
output.config_bot_counter_delete_description: Bots counter channel has been deteled.
output.config_welcome_embed_description_yes: Welcome message embeding is now **✅ On**.
output.config_welcome_embed_description_no: Welcome message embeding is now **❌ Off**.
output.config_goodbye_embed_description_yes: Goodbye message embeding is now **✅ On**.
output.config_goodbye_embed_description_no: Goodbye message embeding is now **❌ Off**.
output.config_remove_old_rank_on_rankup_title: __Remove old rank on rank up configuration__
output.config_remove_old_rank_on_rankup_descrip: Old rank will **now** be removed when giving a new one.
Old rank will **not** be removed when giving a new one.
output.config_view_remove_old_rank_on_rankup: Remove old rank when giving a new one
output.rank_add_description: Role {role} is now a reward for **{number}** invitations.
output.rank_remove_description: Role {role} is not a reward anymore.
output.rank_list_no_rank_description: There is no rank. Add one with `/rank add [role] [number of invites]`.
output.bot_support_description:
Click [here](https://discord.gg/fmJ3ZdH7bb) to join the support server.
In the server, contact `i_am_user` (<@629335496140652557>).
output.help_description: Parameters with `()` are required and parameters with `[]` are optional.
